title: Nanopore Sequencing of Double-Stranded RNA (dsRNA) for Plant Virus and Viroid Detection
author: Fall, Mamadou Lamine
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Thi file contain results of 24 grapevines leaf samples analyzed using dsRNA-MiSeq (Illumina Miseq) and dsRNAcD sequencing (ONT nanopore), that were used in the following article '' Nanopore Sequencing of Double-Stranded RNA (dsRNA) for Plant Virus and Viroid Detection''   submitted in Frontiers in Microbiology
steps_raw: Thi file contain results of 24 grapevines leaf samples analyzed using dsRNA-MiSeq (Illumina Miseq) and dsRNAcD sequencing (ONT nanopore), that were used in the following article '' Nanopore Sequencing of Double-Stranded RNA (dsRNA) for Plant Virus and Viroid Detection''   submitted in Frontiers in Microbiology
